title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while out and about with Air Shakur...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I notice Air Shakur eyeing a claw machine filled
with Umamusume plushies.
choice_data_list: Do you want one by any chance?
Do you want one by any chance?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I've analyzed claw machines before. They're
games that utilize a fusion of digital and
mechanical technology.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
From what I've ascertained, grabbin' a plushie
should be a piece of cake if you do it right.
choice_data_list: In that case, I'll give it a shot.
In that case, I'll give it a shot.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Sure, show me what ya got. Make sure you factor
in the plushie's weight distribution and the track
the claw moves on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
